assumptions: Issue occurs in renewal job processing path.
envelope.normalized_input: Subscription renewal job charges canceled accounts when webhook retries arrive after account status cache invalidation; identify root cause, apply safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused billing safety checks
envelope.raw_input: subscription renewal job charges canceled accounts when webhook retries arrive after account status cache invalidation; identify root cause, apply safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused billing safety checks
envelope.user_goal: Identify root cause of incorrect charges on canceled accounts and apply safe fix with rollback and verification

global_invariants: no mutation without prior discovery and design
mutation requires verification and rollback availability
target locations identified before any write

phase-aware plans must populate non-empty step.task_id for every step

mutation requires prior DESIGN step output rollback_plan

plan.objective: Identify root cause of incorrect charges on canceled accounts and apply safe fix with rollback and verification

steps.instruction: Discover source locations for subscription renewal job, webhook retry logic, and account status cache invalidation
Analyze renewal job processing path, webhook retry timing, and cache invalidation sequence for root cause evidence
Convert candidates to narrow mutation_scope, produce fix_design, rollback_plan, and verification_plan
Apply bounded fix using mutation_scope and fix_design, produce change_summary and rollback_patch
Verify root-cause match, scope containment, billing safety checks using change_summary and evidence
Produce final_report summarizing root cause, fix, rollback, and verification results

plan.strategy: discovery-first sequencing to resolve ambiguity before any mutation, using separate steps for discovery, evidence, design, bounded mutation, verification, and finalize

runs.prompt: subscription renewal job charges canceled accounts when webhook retries arrive after account status cache invalidation; identify root cause, apply safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused billing safety checks

assumptions: issue occurs in production search system handling private documents.
envelope.normalized_input: Search indexing pipeline drops private document ACL updates when incremental reindex overlaps permission migration; identify root cause, implement safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused access-control checks
envelope.raw_input: search indexing pipeline drops private document ACL updates when incremental reindex overlaps permission migration; identify root cause, implement safe fix, include rollback plan, and verify with focused access-control checks
envelope.user_goal: Identify root cause of dropped ACL updates in search indexing pipeline during reindex/migration overlap, implement safe fix with rollback plan, and verify via focused access-control checks
